analysis.btc_price_note: BTC ~$76,550-$78,178 on May 1 (consensus ~$77,200). Up +2% in 24h. Strong April +13% monthly gain. Key resistance at $80K not broken. 74% of altcoins in the red despite BTC recovery.

analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held 3.5-3.75% Apr 28-29, hawkish tone. No major macro releases in next 24h. Next key catalysts: ISM Services May 5, NFP May 8, CPI May 12, PPI May 13. No FOMC until Jun 2026.
analysis.regime_rationale: Neutral (0.40): BTC recovering +2% with April being its best month in a year (+13%), institutional demand steady and ETF inflows returning. However, Fed higher-for-longer, rising oil/geopolitical risk, and weak altcoin breadth (74% down) offset bullish signals. $80K is untested resistance. Mixed signals → neutral.
